text:
いい感じだったね、本当！
やっぱり一緒に来てよかったよ！

高低差のあるところでも
ちゃんと戦っていけたね。
いやー、成長を実感できるね！

きっちり終わってよかったね！
さ、

That was everything I hoped for! I'm so glad I
teamed up with you!

That was great, how we handled the mix
of high and low ground and kept on
fighting. Can't you just taste the
progress we're making?

We sure tied a bow on that!
Time to head home.
